title: Checkpoint training so a run is resumable
description: Persist model weights, optimizer state, and epoch on a schedule so an interrupted run resumes instead of restarting.
body: Use when a training run is long enough that losing it costs real time or money. Do not save weights alone — without optimizer state (momentum, Adam moments) and the epoch/step counter, resuming restarts the schedule and degrades results. Actions: checkpoint weights, optimizer state, scheduler state, and step on an interval and at best-validation; verify a resume reproduces the loss. Validation signals include a restored checkpoint that continues at the same loss and a best-metric checkpoint kept separate from the latest. Risk boundary: an un-resumable run on preemptible hardware can vanish; for multi-hour jobs, treat missing checkpoints as a blocking gap.
